overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a third-person perspective following a character walking through a sunlit cyberpunk city street. The character moves from a main road under elevated highways and past industrial buildings, eventually turning into a narrow alley with a food vendor.

white vehicle drives past on the street to the left

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a sunlit street corner under an elevated highway structure. The camera follows a woman walking along a concrete sidewalk, passing a palm tree and industrial buildings. A vehicle drives past on the adjacent road as the character moves forward through the sparse pedestrian traffic.

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive pink digital billboard attached to the overpass, passing large industrial storage tanks on the left and metal walkways on the right. The environment is distinctly industrial with concrete and metal structures dominating the view. The camera continues following the woman as she moves through the sunlit street with parked vehicles visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with food vendor cart

stops near the food vendor cart at the end of the alley

agents.ego_description: following the woman as she turns into the alley and stops near a food vendor cart

person leaning against the wall near the vendor cart

entered.detail: food cart with black and yellow checkered pattern and large white wheels
low industrial building with red brick facade and metal doors
red illuminated signage on the brick building wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a narrow alleyway, leaving the main street behind. The scene shifts to a more enclosed space with a food vendor cart featuring a checkered pattern positioned in the center. The woman being followed stops near the cart, while another person stands leaning against the wall. The environment features red brick buildings and industrial dumpsters, with the elevated highway still visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit industrial thoroughfare into the confined space of a narrow urban alley. It begins at a street corner under an elevated highway, following a woman as she walks past a palm tree and industrial buildings while a vehicle drives by on the adjacent road. As she moves forward, the environment becomes more imposing, passing beneath a massive pink digital billboard and alongside large industrial storage tanks and metal walkways. The scene then shifts as the character turns right, leaving the open street behind to enter a secluded alleyway lined with red brick buildings and industrial dumpsters. Finally, the camera comes to a halt as the woman stops near a checkered food vendor cart, with the elevated highway still looming in the distant background.
